title: When using cross account functionality, will the archived date will also be moved?
excerpt: When folders with boards and dashboards are copied from one account to another will the archived items will also be moved?

posts.author: NJohn (NJohn)
posts.cookedHtml: When folders with boards and dashboards are copied from one account to another will the archived items will also be moved?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

From my understanding this isn’t currently possible, however I am checking in with the relevant team and will update you as soon as I hear back

Update: Archived data will not be moved using the cross account functionality. A workaround is to unarchive the data, copy it over and then archive them back.

Hope this helps

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@NJohn ,

When folders with boards and dashboards are copied from one account to another using Monday.com, archived items will not be moved. Only active items within the boards and dashboards will be copied over to the new account. Archived items remain in the original account and are not included in the copying process.
